title: hieracium rupicola subsp. aldeanum
intro: Hieracium rupicola subsp. aldeanum, also known as alpine hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium rupicola plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This perennial herb is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of alpine hawkweed include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Alpine hawkweed can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
